creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission Tobias.

On a quick review, it's probably better to use DISTVERSION=0.2~beta1 which will automatically derive the correct PORTVERSION for you, and enabling a cleaner DISTNAME override:

DISTNAME=		${PKGNAMEPREFIX}${PORTNAME}_${DISTVERSION}

If you could also confirm that this new port passes QA (portlint, poudriere), that would be great
